title: Record abs26k pblock4.5 and spec500 densify

# Abs26k Pblock45 Spec500 Contract

## Abs 26k
absolute compaction trigger densifies to 26k tokens on large windows

## Pblock 4.5
parallel block threshold/target densify to 4.5k/2k for thriftier multi-prefix summarize

## Spec 500
speculative step buffer densifies to 500 tokens so pre-turn compaction fires earlier

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy vitest
